channel.title: IPR-CAD — News & Announcements
channel.description: Announcements, deadlines and updates from the IPR-CAD International Scientific Conference.

item.title: News Intelligence Room Deployed
item.description: Central database path established for chronological institutional statements and tracking outputs.

item.title: Eurasian Advisory Directorate Fully Operational
item.description: Eurasian regulatory counsel profiles linked across cross-referenced verification ecosystems.

item.title: Technical FAQ Helpdesk Online
item.description: Structured Knowledge Base deployed to map researcher identities and structural repository compliance metrics.
